nodes.title: Load Business And Partners
nodes.description: On page load, run Promise.all([api.getBusiness(bizId), api.getPartners(bizId)]). Success: update business and partners signals and render list. Failure: log error and end loading without new data.

nodes.title: Compute Share Distribution
nodes.description: After loading, compute totalShares by summing partner.sharePercentage for rendering summary progress bar and chart segment percentages.

nodes.title: Open Partner Form
nodes.description: When user clicks add/edit, show form modal. In add mode reset fields (fullName, sharePercentage, phone, role, notes). In edit mode prefill selected partner fields and set editingId.

nodes.title: Persist Partner
nodes.description: Construct payload as { ...form, sharePercentage: String(form.sharePercentage), businessId: bizId }. Call PUT /api/partners/:id for edit mode or POST /api/businesses/:bizId/partners for add mode. Success: close modal, show success toast, and reload partners. Failure: show backend error and keep modal open.

nodes.title: Open Delete Confirmation
nodes.description: When user clicks delete, store selected partner in deleteTarget and open modal. Cancel only closes modal.

nodes.title: Delete Partner
nodes.description: After confirm click, call DELETE /api/partners/:id. Success: clear deleteTarget, close modal, show success toast, and reload partner data. Failure: show error toast and keep confirmation visible.
